summary: Tested Pet Life Operating System Mira-native copy on ProductListing.jsx. Non-member landing page fully verified via Playwright with screenshot. Member view code-verified but browser crashed during navigation testing (resource-intensive page). Login API works correctly with test@test.com/test.

integration_issues.issue: Browser crashes when navigating to /celebrate/cakes after login - appears to be resource/memory issue with the page, not a bug

critical_code_review_comments: All requested copy changes correctly implemented in ProductListing.jsx
Non-member landing: Headline 'Personalised for Your Pet', micro-line, benefits card, CTAs, grounding line - ALL CORRECT

Member view (code verified): 'Mira knows [PetName]' badge (line 426), personalized title (line 429), care filters (lines 594, 637, 677), Mira's note (line 732), 'Include' button (line 950) - ALL CORRECT
context_for_next_testing_agent: Non-member landing page copy verified via Playwright. Member view verified via code review. Browser automation has stability issues with /celebrate/cakes page specifically.
